ocr_text: SPEAK FOR YOURSELF, GOALIE MAN. HEY DONNIE! DID MIKEY HAPPEN TO COME ALONG?
speaker: Green Dimension X Ranger
textWithCues: [Playfully teasing] Speak for yourself, goalie man. [Calling out loudly] Hey Donnie! Did Mikey happen to come along?

ocr_text: ...BUT DIMENSION X IS A BIG PLACE, AND IT ONLY HAS SO MANY RANGERS TO PROTECT IT. NICE OF YOU TO BRING SOME MORE BAD GUYS WITH YOU. THE NEUTRINOS COULD USE A BREAK FROM CHASING DOWN WHAT'S LEFT OF KRANG'S ARMY.
speaker: Pink Dimension X Ranger
textWithCues: [Confidently] ...But Dimension X is a big place, and it only has so many Rangers to protect it. [Playfully sarcastic] Nice of you to bring some more bad guys with you. The Neutrinos could use a break from chasing down what's left of Krang's army.
aiReasoning:
I see the text "...BUT DIMENSION X IS A BIG PLACE...". It is in a set of connected speech bubbles.
The tails of the top two bubbles clearly point to the character in pink and black armor holding a staff.
The provided list of unique characters only includes "Green Dimension X Ranger", but this is clearly a different character. I will name her "Pink Dimension X Ranger".
The speaker is a HERO, part of the main team, so Importance is MAJOR.
She is speaking confidently and engaging in typical superhero banter, suggesting a playful or slightly sarcastic tone.
